name: io.github.dairus01/interswitch-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Interswitch APIs — accept payments, send money, manage Verve cards, recharge airtime, issue paycodes, and more across Africa

environmentVariables.name: INTERSWITCH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Interswitch OAuth2 client ID (from Interswitch Developer Console)

environmentVariables.name: INTERSWITCH_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to block all write/transfer operations
